meaning: v.打开包裹(或行李等),卸货,揭开
examples: She went to her room to unpack.
She helped me unpack my things and then we went around to see the other girls.
Sometimes, because a housewarming party happens shortly after a person moves into their new home, people may be asked to help unpack boxes.
Arrive early to watch the vendors unpack their swollen packs and neatly arrange their product displays.
As soon as you pull up to your new house, neighbours appear to help you unpack.
